input: Run capacity planning on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected capacity planning output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the capacity planning workflow

input: Apply capacity planning to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive capacity planning analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to capacity planning
